candidate_definition_hints.text: Total Text Dataset. It consists of 1555 images with more than 3 different text orientations: Horizontal, Multi-Oriented, and Curved, one of a kind.
Updated on April 06, 2022 (Detection leaderboard is updated with FCE, ABPNet, PCR, CentripetalText & HierText)
